ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shifts" (
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shift */,
  "day_from" TEXT /* Starting day of the shift */,
  "time_from" TEXT /* Starting time of the shift */,
  "day_to" TEXT /* Ending day of the shift */,
  "time_to" TEXT /* Ending time of the shift */,
  "shift_type" TEXT /* Type of shift (e.g., morning, evening, night) */,
  "shift_duration" REAL /* Total shift duration in hours */,
  "break_time" REAL /* Total break time in hours */,
  "shift_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the shift (e.g., special instructions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shift_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., operator, technician) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee assigned to the shift */,
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shift assigned */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date of the scheduled shift */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., pending, confirmed, declined) */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_shift_id FOREIGN KEY ("shift_id") REFERENCES shifts ("shift_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "overtime_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each overtime request */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee requesting overtime */,
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shift for which overtime is requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date of the request */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, declined) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the manager who approved the request */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the request was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overtime_requests_shift_id FOREIGN KEY ("shift_id") REFERENCES shifts ("shift_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overtime_requests_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shift_swaps" (
  "swap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shift swap request */,
  "employee_id_from" INTEGER /* ID of the employee requesting the swap */,
  "employee_id_to" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who is swapping shifts */,
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shift being swapped */,
  "swap_date" TEXT /* Date of the swap request */,
  "swap_status" TEXT /* Status of the swap (e.g., pending, accepted, declined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("swap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shift_swaps_employee_id_to FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id_to") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shift_swaps_employee_id_from FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id_from") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shift_swaps_shift_id FOREIGN KEY ("shift_id") REFERENCES shifts ("shift_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., schedule change, overtime request, shift swap) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_off_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time off request */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee requesting time off */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date of the request */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of time off requested (e.g., vacation, sick leave, personal day) */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, declined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_off_requests_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shift */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of the shift */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., present, absent, late) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_shift_id FOREIGN KEY ("shift_id") REFERENCES shifts ("shift_id")
)
